scripts.vectorize:indexes: wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index memory-graph-mcp-embeddings --property-name=namespace_id --type=string && wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index memory-graph-mcp-embeddings --property-name=kind --type=string && wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index memory-graph-mcp-embeddings --property-name=type --type=string && wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index memory-graph-mcp-embeddings --property-name=created_at --type=number && wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index memory-graph-mcp-embeddings --property-name=role --type=string && wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index memory-graph-mcp-embeddings --property-name=conversation_id --type=string && wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index memory-graph-mcp-embeddings --property-name=entity_id --type=string
scripts.vectorize:indexes:b: wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index memory-graph-mcp-embeddings --config wrangler-b.jsonc --property-name=namespace_id --type=string && wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index memory-graph-mcp-embeddings --config wrangler-b.jsonc --property-name=kind --type=string && wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index memory-graph-mcp-embeddings --config wrangler-b.jsonc --property-name=type --type=string && wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index memory-graph-mcp-embeddings --config wrangler-b.jsonc --property-name=created_at --type=number && wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index memory-graph-mcp-embeddings --config wrangler-b.jsonc --property-name=role --type=string && wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index memory-graph-mcp-embeddings --config wrangler-b.jsonc --property-name=conversation_id --type=string && wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index memory-graph-mcp-embeddings --config wrangler-b.jsonc --property-name=entity_id --type=string
scripts.deploy:init: npm run db:init && wrangler deploy --config wrangler-a.jsonc

ACCESS_JWKS_URL.description: JWKS endpoint for token verification, e.g. `https://<team>.cloudflareaccess.com/cdn-cgi/access/certs`.

ACCESS_AUD_TAG.description: Your Access application's **Audience (AUD) tag** — found in the Access app overview page.

COOKIE_ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: Random hex string for cookie encryption. Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`.
